title: Lentil Naengmyeon Stir Fry
description: A spicy and refreshing Chinese-inspired dish featuring chilled naengmyeon noodles, lentils, and Korean chili flakes.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the rinsed lentils and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the chilled naengmyeon noodles and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, until they are well combined with the lentils.
Add the Korean chili flakes, sesame oil, and soy sauce. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the noodles and lentils are well coated.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with additional Korean chili flakes, if desired.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped green onions and a sprinkle of toasted sesame seeds, if desired.
